name: google-contacts
title: Google Contacts
description: Browse, search, and manage your Google Contacts directly from Raycast — create, edit, delete, and action contacts without leaving your keyboard.
author: aic

preferences.name: googleClientId
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: Your Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 Client ID (iOS type, bundle ID: com.raycast). See README for setup.

preferences.name: defaultView
preferences.title: Default View
preferences.description: Choose the default view mode for the contact list.

commands.name: search-contacts
commands.title: Search Contacts
commands.subtitle: Google Contacts
commands.description: Browse, search, and manage your Google Contacts with a full detail view.

commands.name: quick-add-contact
commands.title: Quick Add Contact
commands.subtitle: Google Contacts
commands.description: Quickly add a new contact directly from the command bar.

commands.name: create-contact
commands.title: Create Contact
commands.subtitle: Google Contacts
commands.description: Add a new Google Contact using a full form with all available fields.

tools.name: google-contacts
tools.title: Google Contacts
tools.description: Let Raycast AI look up, create, and manage your Google Contacts.

evals.name: create-contact
evals.input: @google-contacts Create a new contact named Test User

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
